## Description
Fixes # 

## Type of Change
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature / Optimization tweak
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)

## How Has This Been Tested?
- [ ] Tested on a Virtual Machine (VM)
- [ ] Tested on a physical Windows 11 device
- [ ] OS Build/Version used for testing: ## Checklist
- [ ] My code/script follows the style guidelines of this project.
- [ ] I have commented my scripts, particularly in hard-to-understand areas (like Registry tweaks or complex PowerShell logic).
- [ ] I have updated the `README.md` or relevant documentation if necessary.
- [ ] My changes generate no new system stability warnings or script errors.
